Hero.title: Sell your photos more securely and more profitably than ever before.
Hero.description: Enterprise-grade photography platform with QR automation, AI sorting, secure galleries, GDPR compliance, and automated print fulfillment built for professional photographers in DACH.

PainPoints.title: Photography is a creative business stuck in administrative overhead.
PainPoints.subtitle: Traditional photography workflows cost you time, money, and compliance risk.
PainPoints.point1Desc: Hours spent matching faces to children, classes, and orders for every event.
PainPoints.point2Desc: Slow turnaround and clunky checkout leave 30-50% of potential orders on the table.
PainPoints.point3Desc: Public links, USB sticks and shared drives expose you to fines and reputational damage.
PainPoints.point4Desc: Screenshots, downloads and shared logins quietly destroy your print revenue.
PainPoints.point5Desc: Each event lives in a different folder, tool and inbox — nothing is connected.
PainPoints.point6Desc: You don't know which schools, classes or product mixes actually drive profit.

Steps.title: Automation meets enterprise security
Steps.subtitle: Lumiphoto eliminates manual work while ensuring GDPR compliance

Solution.title: Complete QR-based workflow automation
Solution.subtitle: From child registration to parent purchase, everything is automated, secure, and GDPR-compliant.
Solution.step1Desc: Schools pre-register students with unique QR codes
Solution.step2Desc: Scan QR code before each child is photographed
Solution.step3Desc: Photos automatically sorted to correct galleries
Solution.step4Desc: Parents receive secure access codes to their gallery

Security.title: GDPR-compliant by design
Security.subtitle: Built for professional photographers who need enterprise-grade security without the complexity.
Security.item2: German data centers with ISO 27001 certification
Security.item3: Signed URL technology prevents unauthorized access
Security.item4: Automatic audit logs for compliance reporting

Features.title: Everything you need to grow your photography business
Features.subtitle: Professional tools designed specifically for modern photographers

Revenue.title: Increase revenue by up to 45%
Revenue.subtitle: See how Lumiphoto transforms your photography business economics

Testimonials.title: Photographers running their best season ever.
Testimonials.subtitle: Trusted by professional photographers across Europe
Testimonials.t1Quote: "We went from three exhausted weekends per school to one calm afternoon. Revenue is up 64% and we haven't touched a spreadsheet since."
Testimonials.t2Quote: "Our school clients ask about GDPR before they ask about prices. Lumiphoto's audit logs win the conversation in 15 minutes."
Testimonials.t3Quote: "AI sorting alone paid for the Studio plan at my first event. The print fulfillment is the best part — it keeps me out of the post office."
